name: sitcheck
description: Toilet location and bidet availability. Because why not?

scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:bundle:release: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
